39 and 40 is not implemented within the timelines given below, a bank having
exposure to the borrower shall make additional specific provisions as under:
Additional specific provisions to be
made as a per cent of total outstanding (fund based as well
Timeline for implementation
of viable RP
non-fund based), if RP not implemented within the timeline 180 days from the end of Review Period 20 per cent
365 days from the commencement of Review Period
15 per cent (i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make additional specific provisions as under: additional specific provisions to be made as a per cent of total outstanding (fund based as well timeline for implementation of viable rp non-fund based)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made over and above the higher of the following
controls.control_description:
The additional specific provisions shall be made over and above the higher of
the following, subject to the total provisions held being capped at 100 per cent of
total outstanding:
(1) the provisions already held;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made over and above the higher of the following

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be required to be made in cases where recovery proceedings have been initiated in respect of the borrower
controls.control_description:
The additional specific provisions shall also be required to be made in cases
where recovery proceedings have been initiated in respect of the borrower,
unless the recovery proceedings are fully completed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be required to be made in cases where recovery proceedings have been initiated in respect of the borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reversed as under: (1) where the resolution plan involves only payment of overdues by the borrower - the additional provisions may be reversed only
controls.control_description:
The additional specific provisions specified in paragraph 47 may be reversed as
under:
(1) where the resolution plan involves only payment of overdues by the
borrower - the additional provisions may be reversed only if the borrower
is not in default for a period of six months from the date of clearing of the
overdues with all the specified lenders;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reversed as under: (1) where the resolution plan involves only payment of overdues by the borrower - the additional provisions may be reversed only

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reversed upon implementation of the resolution plan
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reversed upon implementation of the resolution plan

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reversed on filing of insolvency application and the remaining additional provisions may be reversed upon admission of the borrower into the insolv
controls.control_description:
(3) where resolution is pursued under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code,
2016 - half of the additional provisions made may be reversed on filing
of insolvency application and the remaining additional provisions may be
reversed upon admission of the borrower into the insolvency resolution
process under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reversed on filing of insolvency application and the remaining additional provisions may be reversed upon admission of the borrower into the insolv

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reversed upon completion of the assignment of debt / recovery
controls.control_description:
or,
(4) where assignment of debt / recovery proceedings is initiated - the
additional provisions may be reversed upon completion of the
assignment of debt / recovery.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reversed upon completion of the assignment of debt / recovery

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to all restructurings, including those undertaken under the insolvency and bankruptcy code, 2016
controls.control_description:
The provisions of this Chapter shall be applicable to all restructurings, including
those undertaken under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to all restructurings, including those undertaken under the insolvency and bankruptcy code, 2016

controls.control_objective: To ensure be immediately downgraded as non- performing assets, i
controls.control_description:
An account classified as 'standard' shall be immediately downgraded as non-
performing assets, i.e., sub-standard' to begin with, following a restructuring by
a bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be immediately downgraded as non- performing assets, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to have the same asset classification as prior to restructuring
controls.control_description:
An account classified as non-performing asset, upon restructuring by a bank,
shall continue to have the same asset classification as prior to restructuring.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to have the same asset classification as prior to restructuring

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the ageing criteria as per extant asset classification norms contained in the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - inc
controls.control_description:
In both above cases, the asset classification shall continue to be governed by
the ageing criteria as per extant asset classification norms contained in the
Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Income Recognition, Asset
Classification and Provisioning) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the ageing criteria as per extant asset classification norms contained in the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - inc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated by a bank as standard asset during the monitoring period under the approved resolution plan
controls.control_description:
Any additional finance approved under the resolution plan (including any
resolution plan approved by the Adjudicating Authority under Insolvency and
Bankruptcy Code, 2016) may be treated by a bank as standard asset during the
monitoring period under the approved resolution plan, provided the account
demonstrates satisfactory performance during the monitoring period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated by a bank as standard asset during the monitoring period under the approved resolution plan

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed in the same asset classification category as the restructured debt by a bank
controls.control_description:
If the restructured asset fails to perform satisfactorily during the monitoring period
or does not qualify for upgradation at the end of the monitoring period, the
additional finance shall be placed in the same asset classification category as
the restructured debt by a bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed in the same asset classification category as the restructured debt by a bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as standard asset during the insolvency resolution process period as defined in the insolvency and bankruptcy code, 2016
controls.control_description:
Any interim finance [as defined in section 5 (15) of the Insolvency and Bankruptcy
Code, 2016] extended by the specified lenders to borrowers undergoing
insolvency proceedings under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016 may
be treated as standard asset during the insolvency resolution process period as
defined in the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as standard asset during the insolvency resolution process period as defined in the insolvency and bankruptcy code, 2016

controls.control_objective: To ensure be upgraded only when all the outstanding loan / credit facilities in the account demonstrate 'satisfactory performance' with respect to all the speci
controls.control_description:
Standard accounts classified as non-performing and non-performing accounts
retained in the same category on restructuring by a bank may be upgraded only
when all the outstanding loan / credit facilities in the account demonstrate
'satisfactory performance' with respect to all the specified lenders during the
monitoring period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be upgraded only when all the outstanding loan / credit facilities in the account demonstrate 'satisfactory performance' with respect to all the speci

controls.control_objective: To ensure the account cannot be upgraded before one year from the commencement of the first payment of interest or principal (whichever is later) on the credit
controls.control_description:
Provided that the account cannot be upgraded before one year from the
commencement of the first payment of interest or principal (whichever is later)
on the credit facility with longest period of moratorium under the terms of RP.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the account cannot be upgraded before one year from the commencement of the first payment of interest or principal (whichever is later) on the credit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered for upgradation to 'standard' only if it demonstrates satisfactory performance during the specified period for that particular bank
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding the requirement in paragraph 58, a MSME account where
aggregate exposure of the commercial banks (including SFBs, but excluding
PBs, LABs and RRBs) is less than ₹25 crores may be considered for upgradation
to 'standard' only if it demonstrates satisfactory performance during the specified
period for that particular bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered for upgradation to 'standard' only if it demonstrates satisfactory performance during the specified period for that particular bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be rated as investment grade (bbb- or better), at the time of upgrade, by credit rating agencies accredited by the reserve bank for the purpose o
controls.control_description:
In addition to the requirement in paragraph 58, for accounts where the aggregate
exposure of specified lenders is ₹100 crore and above at the time of
implementation of resolution plan, to qualify for an upgrade, in addition to
demonstration of satisfactory performance, the credit facilities of the borrower
shall also be rated as investment grade (BBB- or better), at the time of upgrade,
by credit rating agencies accredited by the Reserve Bank for the purpose of bank
loan ratings.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be rated as investment grade (bbb- or better), at the time of upgrade, by credit rating agencies accredited by the reserve bank for the purpose o

controls.control_objective: To ensure require two ratings, those below ₹500 crore shall require one rating
controls.control_description:
Provided that while accounts with aggregate exposure of ₹500 crore and above
shall require two ratings, those below ₹500 crore shall require one rating.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require two ratings, those below ₹500 crore shall require one rating

controls.control_objective: To ensure be investment grade for the account to qualify for an upgrade
controls.control_description:
Provided further that if the ratings are obtained from more than the required
number of credit rating agencies, all such ratings shall be investment grade for
the account to qualify for an upgrade.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be investment grade for the account to qualify for an upgrade

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the normal ratings provided by the credit rating agencies and not independent credit evaluation specified in paragraph 32
controls.control_description:
Explanation: These ratings referred to in the second proviso shall be the normal
ratings provided by the credit rating agencies and not Independent Credit
Evaluation specified in paragraph 32.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the normal ratings provided by the credit rating agencies and not independent credit evaluation specified in paragraph 32

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to implementation of a fresh restructuring / change in ownership under these directions or under the insolvency and bankruptcy code, 2016
controls.control_description:
If a borrower other than a MSME where aggregate exposure of the commercial
banks (including SFBs, but excluding PBs, LABs and RRBs) is less than ₹25
crores fails to demonstrate satisfactory performance with respect to all the
specified lenders during the monitoring period, asset classification upgrade shall
be subject to implementation of a fresh restructuring / change in ownership under
these Directions or under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to implementation of a fresh restructuring / change in ownership under these directions or under the insolvency and bankruptcy code, 2016

controls.control_objective: To ensure attract provisioning as per the asset classification category as laid out in the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - income recognition, asset c
controls.control_description:
An account that has been restructured shall attract provisioning as per the asset
classification category as laid out in the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial
Banks - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions,
2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to attract provisioning as per the asset classification category as laid out in the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - income recognition, asset c

controls.control_objective: To ensure make additional specific provision of 15 per cent for an account referred to in paragraph 61 and 62 at the end of the review period
controls.control_description:
A bank shall make additional specific provision of 15 per cent for an account
referred to in paragraph 61 and 62 at the end of the Review Period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make additional specific provision of 15 per cent for an account referred to in paragraph 61 and 62 at the end of the review period

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reversed when the accounts are upgraded to standard category
controls.control_description:
Specific provisions held on restructured assets by a bank as per paragraph 63
above, may be reversed when the accounts are upgraded to standard category.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reversed when the accounts are upgraded to standard category

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reversed as per the norms laid down in paragraph 50
controls.control_description:
Additional specific provisions as required under paragraph 64, along with other
additional specific provisions, may be reversed as per the norms laid down in
paragraph 50.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reversed as per the norms laid down in paragraph 50

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed by the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - income recognition, asset classification and provisioning) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
During the insolvency resolution process period, provisioning for the interim
finance shall be governed by the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks -
Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be governed by the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - income recognition, asset classification and provisioning) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the norms applicable to additional finance, as per paragraphs 55 and 56
controls.control_description:
Subsequently, upon approval of the resolution plan by the Adjudicating Authority,
treatment of such interim finance shall be as per the norms applicable to
additional finance, as per paragraphs 55 and 56.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as per the norms applicable to additional finance, as per paragraphs 55 and 56

controls.control_objective: To ensure keep the provisions held as on the date of such submission of rp frozen for a period of six months from the date of submission of the plan or up to ni
controls.control_description:
In respect of accounts of borrowers where a final resolution plan, as approved
by the Committee of Creditors, has been submitted by the Resolution
Professional for approval of the Adjudicating Authority (in terms of section 30(6)
of the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016), a bank may keep the provisions
held as on the date of such submission of RP frozen for a period of six months
from the date of submission of the plan or up to ninety days from the date of
approval of the resolution plan by the Adjudicating Authority in terms of section
31 (1) of the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016, whichever is earlier.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to keep the provisions held as on the date of such submission of rp frozen for a period of six months from the date of submission of the plan or up to ni

controls.control_objective: To ensure make additional provisioning to the extent of the shortfall
controls.control_description:
Provided that in cases where the provisioning held is lower than the expected
required provisioning, a bank shall make additional provisioning to the extent of
the shortfall.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make additional provisioning to the extent of the shortfall

controls.control_objective: To ensure be available only in cases where the provisioning held by a bank as on the date of submission of the plan for approval of the adjudicating authority i
controls.control_description:
The facility of freezing the quantum of the provision as per paragraph 69 shall be
available only in cases where the provisioning held by a bank as on the date of
submission of the plan for approval of the Adjudicating Authority is more than the
expected provisioning required to be held in the normal course upon
implementation of the approved resolution plan, taking into account the contours
of the resolution plan approved by Committee of Creditors / Adjudicating
Authority, as the case may be, and extant prudential norms.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be available only in cases where the provisioning held by a bank as on the date of submission of the plan for approval of the adjudicating authority i

controls.control_objective: To ensure reverse the excess provisions held as on the date of submission of the resolution plan for approval of the adjudicating authority at this stage
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding paragraph 70, a bank shall not reverse the excess provisions
held as on the date of submission of the resolution plan for approval of the
Adjudicating Authority at this stage.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reverse the excess provisions held as on the date of submission of the resolution plan for approval of the adjudicating authority at this stage

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the requirements in the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - income recognition, asset classification and provisioning) directions, 202
controls.control_description:
Subsequent to the lapse of the period specified in paragraph 69, provisioning
shall be as per the requirements in the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks
- Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as per the requirements in the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - income recognition, asset classification and provisioning) directions, 202

controls.control_objective: To ensure lapse immediately if the adjudicating authority rejects the resolution plan thus submitted, and asset classification in respect of such borrower shall
controls.control_description:
The facility of freezing of provisions as allowed in paragraph 69 shall lapse
immediately if the Adjudicating Authority rejects the resolution plan thus
submitted, and asset classification in respect of such borrower shall continue be
governed by the extant asset classification norms.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to lapse immediately if the adjudicating authority rejects the resolution plan thus submitted, and asset classification in respect of such borrower shall

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recognised on cash basis
controls.control_description:
Interest income in respect of restructured accounts classified as 'standard assets'
may be recognized on accrual basis and that in respect of the restructured
accounts classified as 'non-performing assets' shall be recognised on cash basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recognised on cash basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recognised only on cash basis except when the restructuring is accompanied by a change in ownership
controls.control_description:
In the case of additional finance in accounts where the pre-restructuring facilities
were classified as non-performing assets, the interest income shall be
recognised only on cash basis except when the restructuring is accompanied by
a change in ownership.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recognised only on cash basis except when the restructuring is accompanied by a change in ownership

controls.control_objective: To ensure be continued / upgraded as 'standard' by a bank, after the change in ownership is implemented, either under the insolvency and bankruptcy code, 2016 o
controls.control_description:
In case of change in ownership of the borrowing entity, credit facilities of the
concerned borrowing entities may be continued / upgraded as 'standard' by a
bank, after the change in ownership is implemented, either under the Insolvency
and Bankruptcy Code, 2016 or under these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be continued / upgraded as 'standard' by a bank, after the change in ownership is implemented, either under the insolvency and bankruptcy code, 2016 o

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the following conditions: (1) the bank shall conduct necessary due diligence in this regard and clearly establish that the acquirer is n
controls.control_description:
If the change in ownership is implemented under these Directions, then the
classification as 'standard' shall be subject to the following conditions:
(1) The bank shall conduct necessary due diligence in this regard and clearly
establish that the acquirer is not a person disqualified in terms of Section
29A of the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the following conditions: (1) the bank shall conduct necessary due diligence in this regard and clearly establish that the acquirer is n

controls.control_objective: To ensure clearly establish that the 'new promoter' is not a person / entity / subsidiary / associate etc
controls.control_description:
(2) The bank shall clearly establish that the 'new promoter' is not a person /
entity / subsidiary / associate etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to clearly establish that the 'new promoter' is not a person / entity / subsidiary / associate etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure have acquired at least 26 per cent of the paid- up equity capital as well as voting rights of the borrower entity and shall be the single largest shar
controls.control_description:
(3) The new promoter shall have acquired at least 26 per cent of the paid-
up equity capital as well as voting rights of the borrower entity and shall
be the single largest shareholder of the borrower entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have acquired at least 26 per cent of the paid- up equity capital as well as voting rights of the borrower entity and shall be the single largest shar

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in 'control' of the borrower entity as per the definition of 'control' in the companies act, 2013 / regulations issued by the securities and exchan
controls.control_description:
(4) The new promoter shall be in 'control' of the borrower entity as per the
definition of 'control' in the Companies Act, 2013 / regulations issued by
the Securities and Exchange Board of India / any other applicable
regulations / accounting standards, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in 'control' of the borrower entity as per the definition of 'control' in the companies act, 2013 / regulations issued by the securities and exchan

controls.control_objective: To ensure trigger a fresh review period
controls.control_description:
If the account fails to perform satisfactorily at any point of time during the
monitoring period, it shall trigger a fresh Review Period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to trigger a fresh review period

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reversed only after the end of monitoring period subject to satisfactory performance during the same
controls.control_description:
The quantum of provisions held (excluding additional provisions) by the bank
against the said account as on the date of change in ownership of the borrowing
entities may be reversed only after the end of monitoring period subject to
satisfactory performance during the same.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reversed only after the end of monitoring period subject to satisfactory performance during the same

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be under lock-in in the hands of the bank for the remaining lock-in period
controls.control_description:
In case the promoters' shares have been pledged with a bank as collateral during
the lock-in period mandated under Securities and Exchange Board of India
(Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) (ICDR) Regulations, 2018, and
the pledge is invoked during the lock-in period by the bank consequent to default
by the company, such shares may be transferred to the bank but shall continue
to be under lock-in in the hands of the bank for the remaining lock-in period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be under lock-in in the hands of the bank for the remaining lock-in period

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as an event of restructuring for the purpose of asset classification and provisioning in the books of a bank with regard to the residual de
controls.control_description:
A sale and leaseback transaction of the assets of a borrower or other
transactions of similar nature shall be treated as an event of restructuring for the
purpose of asset classification and provisioning in the books of a bank with
regard to the residual debt of the seller as well as the debt of the buyer if all the
following conditions are met:
(1) the seller of the assets is in financial difficulty;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as an event of restructuring for the purpose of asset classification and provisioning in the books of a bank with regard to the residual de

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as 'restructuring' by a bank if the borrower concerned is under financial difficulty
controls.control_description:
or
(2) with the support (where permitted) from the Indian banking system in the
form of Guarantees / Standby Letters of Credit / Letters of Comfort, etc.,
such events shall be treated as 'restructuring' by a bank if the borrower
concerned is under financial difficulty.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as 'restructuring' by a bank if the borrower concerned is under financial difficulty

controls.control_objective: To ensure remain ineligible for restructuring
controls.control_description:
Borrowers who have committed frauds/ malfeasance/ wilful default as well as any
entity with which a wilful defaulter is associated shall remain ineligible for
restructuring.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to remain ineligible for restructuring

controls.control_objective: To ensure take a view on restructuring such accounts based on their viability, without prejudice to the continuance of criminal action against the erstwhile pro
controls.control_description:
However, in cases where the existing promoters are replaced by new promoters
satisfying the conditions specified at sub-paras (1) to (4) of paragraph 77, and the
borrower company is totally delinked from such erstwhile promoters /
management, a bank may take a view on restructuring such accounts based on
their viability, without prejudice to the continuance of criminal action against the
erstwhile promoters / management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take a view on restructuring such accounts based on their viability, without prejudice to the continuance of criminal action against the erstwhile pro

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible for restructuring subsequent to removal of the name of wilful defaulter from the list of wilful defaulters
controls.control_description:
A wilful defaulter or any entity with which a wilful defaulter is associated shall be
eligible for restructuring subsequent to removal of the name of wilful defaulter
from the List of Wilful Defaulters, subject to penal measures applicable to
borrowers classified as wilful defaulter in terms of the Reserve Bank of India
(Commercial Banks - Treatment of Wilful Defaulters and Large Defaulters)
Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible for restructuring subsequent to removal of the name of wilful defaulter from the list of wilful defaulters

controls.control_objective: To ensure be to maximise the possible recovery from a distressed borrower at minimum expense, in the best interest of the bank
controls.control_description:
The objective of compromise settlements shall be to maximise the possible
recovery from a distressed borrower at minimum expense, in the best interest of
the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be to maximise the possible recovery from a distressed borrower at minimum expense, in the best interest of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be without prejudice to any mutually agreed contractual provisions between a bank and a borrower relating to future contingent realizations or recovery by the bank
controls.control_description:
The compromise settlements and technical write-offs shall be without prejudice
to any mutually agreed contractual provisions between a bank and a borrower
relating to future contingent realizations or recovery by the bank, subject to such
claims not being recognised in any manner on the balance sheet of the bank at
the time of the settlement or subsequently till actual realization of such
receivables.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be without prejudice to any mutually agreed contractual provisions between a bank and a borrower relating to future contingent realizations or recovery by the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure render the arrangement to be treated as restructuring
controls.control_description:
Provided that any such claims recognised on the balance sheet of the bank shall
render the arrangement to be treated as restructuring.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to render the arrangement to be treated as restructuring

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as restructuring
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding paragraph 89, compromise settlements where the time for
payment of the agreed settlement amount exceeds three months shall be treated
as restructuring.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as restructuring

controls.control_objective: To ensure also fall under the definition of restructuring and shall be governed by the provisions applicable thereto
controls.control_description:
Any arrangement involving part settlement with the borrower shall also fall under
the definition of restructuring and shall be governed by the provisions applicable
thereto.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also fall under the definition of restructuring and shall be governed by the provisions applicable thereto

controls.control_objective: To ensure undermined in any manner
controls.control_description:
However, such technical write-offs do not entail any waiver of claims against the
borrower and thus the bank's right to recovery shall not undermined in any
manner.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undermined in any manner

controls.control_objective: To ensure be with reference to the original exposure
controls.control_description:
In case of partial technical write-offs, the prudential requirements in respect of
residual exposure, including provisioning and asset classification, shall be with
reference to the original exposure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be with reference to the original exposure

controls.control_objective: To ensure meet the extant provisioning requirements, as computed on the gross value of the asset
controls.control_description:
Provided that the amount of provision including the amount representing
partial technical write-off shall meet the extant provisioning requirements, as
computed on the gross value of the asset.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to meet the extant provisioning requirements, as computed on the gross value of the asset

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a reporting mechanism to the next higher authority, at least on a quarterly basis, with respect to compromise settlements and technical write offs
controls.control_description:
There shall be a reporting mechanism to the next higher authority, at least on a
quarterly basis, with respect to compromise settlements and technical write offs
approved by a particular authority.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a reporting mechanism to the next higher authority, at least on a quarterly basis, with respect to compromise settlements and technical write offs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to the board
controls.control_description:
Provided that compromise settlements and technical write-offs approved by
the MD & CEO / Board Level Committee shall be reported to the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported to the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure mandate a suitable reporting format so as to ensure adequate coverage of the following aspects at the minimum: (1) trend in number of accounts and amo
controls.control_description:
The Board shall mandate a suitable reporting format so as to ensure adequate
coverage of the following aspects at the minimum:
(1) trend in number of accounts and amounts subjected to compromise
settlement and/or technical write-off (q-o-q and y-o-y);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mandate a suitable reporting format so as to ensure adequate coverage of the following aspects at the minimum: (1) trend in number of accounts and amo

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a cooling period as determined by the respective board approved policies before the bank can assume fresh exposures to such borrowers
controls.control_description:
In respect of borrowers subject to compromise settlements, there shall be a
cooling period as determined by the respective Board approved policies before
the bank can assume fresh exposures to such borrowers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a cooling period as determined by the respective board approved policies before the bank can assume fresh exposures to such borrowers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to a floor of 12 months with a bank being free to stipulate higher cooling periods in terms of their board approved policies
controls.control_description:
Provided that the cooling period in respect of exposures other than farm
credit exposures shall be subject to a floor of 12 months with a bank being
free to stipulate higher cooling periods in terms of their Board approved
policies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to a floor of 12 months with a bank being free to stipulate higher cooling periods in terms of their board approved policies

controls.control_objective: To ensure be determined by a bank as per their respective board approved policies
controls.control_description:
Provided further that the cooling period for farm credit exposures shall be
determined by a bank as per their respective Board approved policies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be determined by a bank as per their respective board approved policies

controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that the borrowers to be covered under DRS are selected
strictly as per terms of such schemes so as to avoid subsequent non-admission
by the authorities on technical grounds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the borrowers to be covered under drs are selected strictly as per terms of such schemes so as to avoid subsequent non-admission by the au

controls.control_objective: To ensure be clearly communicated to the borrowers at the time of obtaining explicit consent from the borrower for availing benefits under a proposed drs
controls.control_description:
The terms and conditions of the scheme as well as the prudential aspects,
including cooling period for extending fresh credit, impact on credit score etc.,
shall be clearly communicated to the borrowers at the time of obtaining explicit
consent from the borrower for availing benefits under a proposed DRS.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be clearly communicated to the borrowers at the time of obtaining explicit consent from the borrower for availing benefits under a proposed drs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as a compromise settlement and shall attract the prudential treatment contained in paragraphs 87-102
controls.control_description:
Any waiver of accrued but unrealised interest and / or sacrifice of principal
undertaken by a bank in the borrower accounts of beneficiaries of the DRS, either
as part of the implementation of the scheme or subsequent to its implementation,
shall be treated as a compromise settlement and shall attract the prudential
treatment contained in paragraphs 87-102.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as a compromise settlement and shall attract the prudential treatment contained in paragraphs 87-102

controls.control_objective: To ensure lead to extinguishment of borrower's debt obligations
controls.control_description:
If the funds received by a bank as part of the DRS covers the entire outstanding
dues of the borrower, including principal and interest accrued till the date of
receipt of funds by the bank, the same shall lead to extinguishment of borrower's
debt obligations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to lead to extinguishment of borrower's debt obligations

controls.control_objective: To ensure be evaluated as per the terms and conditions of the original loan contract
controls.control_description:
In cases where the funds received by a bank as part of the scheme are not
adequate to cover the entire outstanding dues of the borrower, leading to residual
exposure (principal and / or accrued interest), the asset classification of the
residual exposure shall be evaluated as per the terms and conditions of the
original loan contract.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be evaluated as per the terms and conditions of the original loan contract

controls.control_objective: To ensure be evaluated against the test of restructuring as defined in these directions and shall attract the prudential treatment therein
controls.control_description:
Provided that any changes / modifications to the terms and conditions of the
original loan contract in such cases shall be evaluated against the test of
restructuring as defined in these Directions and shall attract the prudential
treatment therein.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be evaluated against the test of restructuring as defined in these directions and shall attract the prudential treatment therein

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the commercial discretion of the bank under relevant internal policy
controls.control_description:
Any fresh credit exposure to such borrowers shall be as per the commercial
discretion of the bank under relevant internal policy, subject to extant applicable
regulations.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be as per the commercial discretion of the bank under relevant internal policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the extant guidelines in this regard
controls.control_description:
A bank's reporting in respect of the borrowers under the scheme to the credit
information companies shall be guided by the extant guidelines in this regard.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be guided by the extant guidelines in this regard

controls.control_objective: To ensure be creation of any receivable against the government on account of the drs and the exposure shall continue to be on the borrower till receipt of funds
controls.control_description:
There shall not be creation of any receivable against the Government on account
of the DRS and the exposure shall continue to be on the borrower till receipt of
funds by the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be creation of any receivable against the government on account of the drs and the exposure shall continue to be on the borrower till receipt of funds

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to apply the prudential norms including prudential norms on income recognition, asset classification and provisioning, and wherever the accou
controls.control_description:
Till receipt of funds, a bank shall continue to apply the prudential norms including
prudential norms on income recognition, asset classification and provisioning,
and wherever the accounts are non-performing, the bank may pursue recovery
measures as per their Board approved policy against such borrowers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to apply the prudential norms including prudential norms on income recognition, asset classification and provisioning, and wherever the accou

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply in respect of drs notified on or after december 31, 2024, and shall be without prejudice to the instructions on resolution of stressed assets co
controls.control_description:
The instructions contained in paragraphs 125-136 shall apply in respect of DRS
notified on or after December 31, 2024, and shall be without prejudice to the
instructions on resolution of stressed assets contained in these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply in respect of drs notified on or after december 31, 2024, and shall be without prejudice to the instructions on resolution of stressed assets co

controls.control_objective: To ensure attract specific provision of 100%
controls.control_description:
In respect of relief measures announced prior to December 31, 2024, any dues
pending receipt from Government, for more than 90 days shall attract specific
provision of 100%.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to attract specific provision of 100%

controls.control_objective: To ensure take necessary action and actively follow up with the respective governments for settlement of dues referred to in paragraph 139
controls.control_description:
A bank shall take necessary action and actively follow up with the respective
Governments for settlement of dues referred to in paragraph 139.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take necessary action and actively follow up with the respective governments for settlement of dues referred to in paragraph 139

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to cases where an act of restructuring creates new securities issued by the borrower which would be held by a bank in lieu of a portion
controls.control_description:
This paragraph shall be applicable to cases where an act of restructuring creates
new securities issued by the borrower which would be held by a bank in lieu of a
portion of the pre-restructured exposure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to cases where an act of restructuring creates new securities issued by the borrower which would be held by a bank in lieu of a portion

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed in the same asset classification category by a bank in which the restructured advance has been classified
controls.control_description:
The Funded Interest Term Loan (FITL) / debt / equity instruments created by
conversion of principal / unpaid interest, as the case may be, shall be placed in
the same asset classification category by a bank in which the restructured
advance has been classified.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed in the same asset classification category by a bank in which the restructured advance has been classified

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the higher of: (1) the provisioning applicable to the asset classification category in which such instruments are held by a bank
controls.control_description:
The provisioning applicable to instruments acquired as part of restructuring shall
be the higher of:
(1) The provisioning applicable to the asset classification category in which
such instruments are held by a bank;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the higher of: (1) the provisioning applicable to the asset classification category in which such instruments are held by a bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on conservative assessment of cash flows and appropriate discount rates to reflect the stressed cash flows of the borrowers
controls.control_description:
The overarching principle should be that valuation of instruments arising out of
resolution of stressed assets shall be based on conservative assessment of cash
flows and appropriate discount rates to reflect the stressed cash flows of the
borrowers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be based on conservative assessment of cash flows and appropriate discount rates to reflect the stressed cash flows of the borrowers

controls.control_objective: To ensure specifically examine as to whether the valuations of such instruments reflect the risk of loss associated with such instruments
controls.control_description:
Statutory Auditors should specifically examine as to whether the valuations of
such instruments reflect the risk of loss associated with such instruments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to specifically examine as to whether the valuations of such instruments reflect the risk of loss associated with such instruments

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to all the instructions contained in the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - classification, valuation and operation of investment po
controls.control_description:
Debt / quasi-debt / equity instruments shall be subject to all the instructions
contained in the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Classification,
Valuation and Operation of Investment Portfolio) Directions, 2025 to the extent
they are not inconsistent with these Directions:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to all the instructions contained in the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - classification, valuation and operation of investment po

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued as per the instructions contained in the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - classification, valuation and operation of investment por
controls.control_description:
Debentures / bonds shall be valued as per the instructions contained in the
Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Classification, Valuation and
Operation of Investment Portfolio) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued as per the instructions contained in the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - classification, valuation and operation of investment por

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as prescribed in the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - classification, valuation and operation of investment portfolio) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
Conversion of debt into Zero Coupon Bonds (ZCBs) / low coupon bonds (LCBs)
as part of a resolution plan and the valuation of such instruments shall be as
prescribed in the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Classification,
Valuation and Operation of Investment Portfolio) Directions, 2025, subject to the
following:
(1) Where the borrower fails to build up the sinking fund as required under
the above Directions, ZCBs / LCBs of such borrower shall be collectively
valued at ₹1;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as prescribed in the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - classification, valuation and operation of investment portfolio) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued at market value
controls.control_description:
Equity instruments, where classified as standard, shall be valued at market
value, if quoted, or else, should be valued at the lowest value arrived using the
following valuation methodologies:
(1) Book value (without considering 'revaluation reserves', if any) which is to
be ascertained from the company's latest audited balance sheet.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued at market value

controls.control_objective: To ensure precede the date of valuation by more than 18 months
controls.control_description:
The
date as on which the latest balance sheet is drawn up should not precede
the date of valuation by more than 18 months.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to precede the date of valuation by more than 18 months

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned
controls.control_description:
Further,
cash flows (cash flow available from the current as well as immediately
prospective (not more than six months) level of operations) occurring
within 85 per cent of the useful economic life of the project only shall be
reckoned.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued at market value
controls.control_description:
Equity instruments, where classified as NPA, shall be valued at market value, if
quoted, or else, shall be collectively valued at ₹1.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued at market value

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued as per the instructions contained in the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - classification, valuation and operation of investment portfolio) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
Preference Shares shall be valued as per the instructions contained in the
Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Classification, Valuation and
Operation of Investment Portfolio) Directions, 2025, subject to the following
modifications:
(1) The discount rate shall be subject to a floor of weighted average actual
interest rate charged to the borrower on the residual debt after
restructuring plus a mark-up of 1.5 per cent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued as per the instructions contained in the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - classification, valuation and operation of investment portfolio) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken for accrued dividends / coupons and the value determined as above should be discounted further by at least 15 per cent if arrears are for one
controls.control_description:
(2) Where preference dividends / coupons are in arrears, no credit should
be taken for accrued dividends / coupons and the value determined as
above should be discounted further by at least 15 per cent if arrears are
for one year, 25 per cent if arrears are for two years, so on and so forth
(i.e., with annual increments of ten per cent).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken for accrued dividends / coupons and the value determined as above should be discounted further by at least 15 per cent if arrears are for one

controls.control_objective: To ensure collectively be valued at ₹1 at that point, and till the resolution plan is treated as implemented
controls.control_description:
part of a resolution plan, and if the resolution plan is not deemed as implemented,
such unquoted instruments shall collectively be valued at ₹1 at that point, and till
the resolution plan is treated as implemented.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to collectively be valued at ₹1 at that point, and till the resolution plan is treated as implemented

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a corresponding credit in an account styled as 'sundry liabilities account (interest capitalization)'
controls.control_description:
The unrealised income represented by FITL / Debt or equity instrument should
have a corresponding credit in an account styled as 'Sundry Liabilities Account
(Interest Capitalization)'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a corresponding credit in an account styled as 'sundry liabilities account (interest capitalization)'

controls.control_objective: To ensure be
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be

controls.control_objective: To ensure be exempted from regulatory ceilings / restrictions on capital market exposures, investment in para-banking activities and intra-group exposure
controls.control_description:
Without prejudice to the requirements of Section 19 (2) of the Banking Regulation
Act, 1949, acquisition of shares due to conversion of debt to equity during a
restructuring process shall be exempted from regulatory ceilings / restrictions on
Capital Market Exposures, investment in Para-Banking activities and intra-group
exposure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be exempted from regulatory ceilings / restrictions on capital market exposures, investment in para-banking activities and intra-group exposure

controls.control_objective: To ensure require reporting to department of supervision, reserve bank of india, co every month along with the regular dbs return on asset quality) and disclosu
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding paragraph 157, such acquisition shall require reporting to
Department of Supervision, Reserve Bank of India, CO every month along with
the regular DBS Return on Asset Quality) and disclosure by the bank in the Notes
to Accounts in Annual Financial Statements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require reporting to department of supervision, reserve bank of india, co every month along with the regular dbs return on asset quality) and disclosu

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the lower of (1) or (2) below: (1) the average of the weekly high and low of the volume weighted average price of the related equity shares quoted
controls.control_description:
With reference to the requirements contained in sub-regulations 158 (6) (a) of
ICDR Regulations, 2018, the issue price of the equity shall be the lower of (1) or
(2) below:
(1) The average of the weekly high and low of the volume weighted average
price of the related equity shares quoted on the recognised stock
exchange during the twenty six weeks preceding the 'reference date' or
the average of the weekly high and low of the volume weighted average
prices of the related equity shares quoted on a recognised stock
exchange during the two weeks preceding the 'reference date',
whichever is lower;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the lower of (1) or (2) below: (1) the average of the weekly high and low of the volume weighted average price of the related equity shares quoted

controls.control_objective: To ensure precede the date of restructuring by more than 18 months
controls.control_description:
The date as on which the latest balance sheet is drawn up should
not precede the date of restructuring by more than 18 months.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to precede the date of restructuring by more than 18 months

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the date on which the bank approves the restructuring scheme
controls.control_description:
In the case of conversion of debt into equity, the 'reference date' shall be the
date on which the bank approves the restructuring scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the date on which the bank approves the restructuring scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the date on which the bank approves the conversion of the convertible securities into equities
controls.control_description:
In the case of
conversion of convertible securities into equity, the 'reference date' shall be the
date on which the bank approves the conversion of the convertible securities into
equities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the date on which the bank approves the conversion of the convertible securities into equities

controls.control_objective: To ensure extend relief measures to eligible borrowers, as specified under reserve bank of india (trade relief measures) directions, 2025 dated november 14, 202
controls.control_description:
To mitigate the burden of debt servicing brought about by trade disruptions
caused by global headwinds and to ensure the continuity of viable businesses,
banks may extend relief measures to eligible borrowers, as specified under
Reserve Bank of India (Trade Relief Measures) Directions, 2025 dated
November 14, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to extend relief measures to eligible borrowers, as specified under reserve bank of india (trade relief measures) directions, 2025 dated november 14, 202

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The directions, instructions and
guidelines already repealed vide any of the directions, instructions, and
guidelines listed in the above notification shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may
be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or
punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or
guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the Reserve Bank may, if it considers necessary, issue
necessary clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the
interpretation of any provision of these Directions given by the Reserve Bank
shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure to sacrifice / waive
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of the Model Operating Procedure (MOP), Debt Relief Schemes
(DRS) refer to Schemes notified by the State Governments that entail funding by the
fiscal authorities to cover debt obligations of a targeted segment of borrowers that the
regulated entities are required to sacrifice / waive.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to sacrifice / waive

controls.control_objective: To ensure include the specific stress or distress situation necessitating announcement of such support
controls.control_description:
Announcement / notification of any such DRS should include the specific stress or
distress situation necessitating announcement of such support.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include the specific stress or distress situation necessitating announcement of such support

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered only as a measure of last resort when other measures to alleviate financial stress have failed
controls.control_description:
Given the broader
implications of such DRS for the credit culture, while broad based relief measures can
be addressed through pure fiscal support in the form of Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT),
DRS should be considered only as a measure of last resort when other measures to
alleviate financial stress have failed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered only as a measure of last resort when other measures to alleviate financial stress have failed

controls.control_objective: To ensure engage with the state level bankers' committee (slbc)/ district level consultative committee (dcc) to evolve a coordinated action plan for conceptuali
controls.control_description:
Before announcing any DRS, Governments may engage with the State Level
Bankers' Committee (SLBC)/ District level Consultative Committee (DCC) to evolve a
coordinated action plan for conceptualisation, design, and implementation of the DRS.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to engage with the state level bankers' committee (slbc)/ district level consultative committee (dcc) to evolve a coordinated action plan for conceptuali

controls.control_objective: To ensure , cover critical aspects of the scheme like identification of borrowers, impact assessment, implementation timelines, resolution of issues concerning
controls.control_description:
The schemes should, cover critical aspects of the scheme like identification of
borrowers, impact assessment, implementation timelines, resolution of issues
concerning settlement of dues by Government to the lending institutions, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , cover critical aspects of the scheme like identification of borrowers, impact assessment, implementation timelines, resolution of issues concerning

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the drs do not impact the financial stability aspects of the region / state or create moral hazards in the borrower segments
controls.control_description:
The design features should ensure that the DRS do not impact the financial stability
aspects of the region / State or create moral hazards in the borrower segments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the drs do not impact the financial stability aspects of the region / state or create moral hazards in the borrower segments

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be taken into account
controls.control_description: should also be taken into account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be taken into account

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided upfront towards any proposed drs to fully cover the required settlement amounts
controls.control_description:
Detailed budgetary provisions / funding may be provided upfront towards any
proposed DRS to fully cover the required settlement amounts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided upfront towards any proposed drs to fully cover the required settlement amounts

controls.control_objective: To ensure be announced only on a fully pre-funded basis
controls.control_description:
Where regulated entities
have dues from the Government, pertaining to earlier DRS schemes, new schemes
should be announced only on a fully pre-funded basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be announced only on a fully pre-funded basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be targeted only at the impacted borrowers and should not contain any restrictive covenant against timely repayments
controls.control_description:
The DRS should be targeted only at the impacted borrowers and should not contain
any restrictive covenant against timely repayments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be targeted only at the impacted borrowers and should not contain any restrictive covenant against timely repayments

controls.control_objective: To ensure specify the criteria for determining eligible borrowers on an objective basis, detailed timeline of critical / material events, including cut-off date
controls.control_description:
Further, it should specify the
criteria for determining eligible borrowers on an objective basis, detailed timeline of
critical / material events, including cut-off dates for filing/ submission,
acknowledgement, approval and settlement of claims along with compensation
clauses for delays in settling the funds, on part of the Government.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to specify the criteria for determining eligible borrowers on an objective basis, detailed timeline of critical / material events, including cut-off date

controls.control_objective: To ensure cover the entire outstanding dues of the borrowers being covered, including principal and accumulated interest till the date of receipt of funds by th
controls.control_description:
The DRS should cover the entire outstanding dues of the borrowers being covered,
including principal and accumulated interest till the date of receipt of funds by the
regulated entities from the Government.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cover the entire outstanding dues of the borrowers being covered, including principal and accumulated interest till the date of receipt of funds by th

controls.control_objective: To ensure require the creation of a receivable in the books of the regulated entity against the government
controls.control_description:
The DRS should not require the creation of a receivable in the books of the regulated
entity against the Government.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require the creation of a receivable in the books of the regulated entity against the government

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue and shall be reduced to the extent of funds received from the government
controls.control_description:
The exposure of regulated entities to the borrower shall
continue and shall be reduced to the extent of funds received from the Government.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue and shall be reduced to the extent of funds received from the government

controls.control_objective: To ensure generally be completed within 45 to 60 days
controls.control_description:
The entire implementation of the Scheme and settlement of claims by the
Governments to the regulated entities, should generally be completed within 45 to 60
days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to generally be completed within 45 to 60 days

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain any provision contrary to any regulatory instruction issued by the reserve bank / national bank for agriculture and rural development (nabard)
controls.control_description:
The DRS should not contain any provision contrary to any regulatory instruction
issued by the Reserve Bank / National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development
(NABARD).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contain any provision contrary to any regulatory instruction issued by the reserve bank / national bank for agriculture and rural development (nabard)

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain any provision that casts any obligations on the regulated entities, directly or indirectly, to: a
controls.control_description:
The design of the DRS should not contain any provision that casts any obligations
on the regulated entities, directly or indirectly, to:
a.

controls.control_description:

DRS or subsequently, as per their Board-approved policies, it shall be subject to the
applicable prudential guidelines.
